'''lazoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachera|kachera]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachera|kachera]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lazoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzereth|læzereth]] || [[word:læzerej|læzerej]] || [[word:læzeresh|læzeresh]] || [[word:læzere|læzere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazozoroth|lazozoroth]] || [[word:lazozoroj|lazozoroj]] || [[word:lazozorosh|lazozorosh]] || [[word:lazozoro|lazozoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazoroth|lazoroth]] || [[word:lazoroj|lazoroj]] || [[word:lazorosh|lazorosh]] || [[word:lazoro|lazoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazofroth|lazofroth]] || [[word:lazofroj|lazofroj]] || [[word:lazofrosh|lazofrosh]] || [[word:lazofrof|lazofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazorotho|lazorotho]] || [[word:lazorojo|lazorojo]] || [[word:lazorosho|lazorosho]] || [[word:lazoroko|lazoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazoroth|lazoroth]] || [[word:lazoroj|lazoroj]] || [[word:lazorosh|lazorosh]] || [[word:lazoro|lazoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazorothol|lazorothol]] || [[word:lazorojol|lazorojol]] || [[word:lazoroshol|lazoroshol]] || [[word:lazorokol|lazorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazorothotho|lazorothotho]] || [[word:lazorojojo|lazorojojo]] || [[word:lazoroshosho|lazoroshosho]] || [[word:lazoroko|lazoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazorothon|lazorothon]] || [[word:lazorojon|lazorojon]] || [[word:lazoroshon|lazoroshon]] || [[word:lazorokon|lazorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazorothoro|lazorothoro]] || [[word:lazorojoro|lazorojoro]] || [[word:lazoroshoro|lazoroshoro]] || [[word:lazorokoro|lazorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
